cards.back:
```
Source              | AD
--------------------+-----
Connected           | 0
Static              | 1
EIGRP summary       | 5
External BGP (eBGP) | 20
Internal EIGRP      | 90
IGRP (legacy)       | 100
OSPF                | 110
IS-IS               | 115
RIP                 | 120
External EIGRP      | 170
Internal BGP (iBGP) | 200
Unknown / DHCP      | 254
Untrusted (no install) | 255
```
Lower wins when multiple sources know the same prefix.

```
Network type            | Hello | Dead  | DR election?
------------------------+-------+-------+--------------
Broadcast (Ethernet)    | 10s   | 40s   | yes
Point-to-point          | 10s   | 40s   | no
NBMA                    | 30s   | 120s  | yes (neighbors statically)
Point-to-multipoint     | 30s   | 120s  | no
```
Dead always = 4× Hello.

```
Feature        | HSRP            | VRRP            | GLBP
---------------+-----------------+-----------------+-------------------
Vendor         | Cisco           | IETF (RFC 5798) | Cisco
Default pri    | 100 (range 0-255)| 100 (1-254)    | 100
Preempt default| OFF             | ON              | OFF
Hello / Hold   | 3s / 10s        | 1s / 3s         | 3s / 10s
Virtual MAC    | 0000.0c07.acXX  | 0000.5e00.01XX  | 0007.b400.XXYY
Active count   | 1 active        | 1 master        | up to 4 AVF (load bal!)
Versions       | v1 (0-255), v2 (0-4095, IPv6) | v2 (IPv4), v3 (IPv6) | one version
```

```
Type             | Prefix     | Use
-----------------+------------+----------------------------
Global Unicast   | 2000::/3   | public internet routing
Unique Local     | FC00::/7   | private (RFC 4193)
Link-Local       | FE80::/10  | one-hop, auto-assigned (REQUIRED on every IPv6 interface)
Multicast        | FF00::/8   | one-to-many
Loopback         | ::1/128    | localhost
Unspecified      | ::/128     | unspecified (like 0.0.0.0)
IPv4-mapped      | ::ffff:0:0/96 | IPv6 carrying IPv4
```

```
FF02::1   | All-nodes (like IPv4 broadcast)
FF02::2   | All-routers
FF02::5   | OSPFv3 AllSPFRouters
FF02::6   | OSPFv3 AllDRouters
FF02::9   | RIPng
FF02::A   | EIGRP
FF02::1:2 | All-DHCP-relay-agents
FF02::1:FFxx:xxxx | Solicited-node (for NDP)
```

```
              | Local (inside view)    | Global (outside view)
--------------+------------------------+------------------------
Inside (LAN)  | Inside Local           | Inside Global
              | 10.0.0.5 (real LAN IP) | 200.1.1.1 (translated)
--------------+------------------------+------------------------
Outside (WAN) | Outside Local          | Outside Global
              | (rare — dst-NAT)       | 8.8.8.8 (real internet)
```

```
Step | Message  | Sender → Receiver       | Direction | UDP port
-----+----------+-------------------------+-----------+----------
1    | Discover | Client → Server (bcast) | unicast/bcast | 67 (server)
2    | Offer    | Server → Client         | unicast       | 68 (client)
3    | Request  | Client → Server (bcast) | bcast         | 67 (server)
4    | Ack      | Server → Client         | unicast       | 68 (client)
```

```
Version | Encryption | Key Exchange       | PMF    | Weak to
--------+------------+--------------------+--------+----------------
WPA     | TKIP       | PSK 4-way handshake| optional| dict attacks
WPA2    | AES/CCMP   | PSK 4-way handshake| optional| offline dict
WPA3    | AES/CCMP   | SAE (per-user)     | mandatory| (significantly stronger)
```

cards.front: **WLC AP modes** — when to use each:
cards.back:
```
Mode         | Use
-------------+---------------------------------------------
Local        | Default; serves clients + scans off-channel briefly
FlexConnect  | Branch — local switching if WLC unreachable
Monitor      | No clients; full-time scanning (IDS/IPS feed)
Sniffer      | Captures 802.11 frames, sends to Wireshark
Rogue Det.   | Detects unauthorized APs on wire
Bridge       | Wireless bridge between sites
SE-Connect   | Spectrum analyzer mode
```

```
Traffic class  | DSCP   | IP Prec | CoS | PHB
---------------+--------+---------+-----+------
Best effort    | 0      | 0       | 0   | BE
Bulk           | 10/12/14| 1      | 1   | AF11/12/13
Standard data  | 18/20/22| 2      | 2   | AF21/22/23
Multimedia stm | 26/28/30| 3      | 3   | AF31/32/33 (Video stream)
Voice ctrl     | 34      | 4       | 4   | AF41 (interactive video)
Voice traffic  | 46      | 5       | 5   | EF (Expedited Forwarding)
Signaling      | 26 / 24 | 3 / 3   | 3   | CS3
Network ctrl   | 48/56   | 6/7     | 6/7 | CS6/CS7
```

```
Stratum | Source                    | Accuracy
--------+---------------------------+------------------
0       | Reference clock (GPS, atomic) | μs
1       | Directly attached to S0   | ms
2-15    | Each hop further from S0  | progressively less
16      | UNSYNCHRONIZED            | bad
```

```
Type      | Range       | Matches
----------+-------------+----------------------------------
Standard  | 1-99, 1300-1999 | source IP only
Extended  | 100-199, 2000-2699 | src+dst IP, protocol, ports, flags
Named std | name        | source IP only
Named ext | name        | src+dst IP, protocol, ports, flags
```
Placement: Standard → close to **destination**. Extended → close to **source**.

```
HSRP v1: 0000.0c07.acXX   (XX = group # in hex, range 0-FF)
HSRP v2: 0000.0c9f.fXXX   (XXX = group # in hex, range 0-FFF)
VRRP   : 0000.5e00.01XX
GLBP   : 0007.b400.XXYY   (XX = group, YY = AVF index)
```
Example: HSRP v1 group 10 → 0000.0c07.ac0a (10 dec = 0x0a)
